title: Coffee on Upholstery
stainChemistry: Coffee = browning pigments + chlorogenic acid + tannins. Coffee with cream adds milk milk protein (protein) + butterfat. On upholstery, the tannin-tools-list and code-check apply: NO alkaline cleaners (OxiClean, ammonia, baking soda) — turn tannin permanently darker. NO hot water — sets tannin AND any milk protein. Cushion batting saturation is the real ceiling — never pour, only damp-cloth blot. Code tag (W / W-S / S / X) determines if water-based cleaning is allowed.
whyThisWorks: Cold water + Dawn + 3% peroxide on a damp cloth oxidizes tannin without damaging the upholstery. Vinegar rinse keeps tannin on the lighter (acid) side. Damp-cloth-only application + weighted extraction prevents pad saturation. Coffee with cream adds an enzyme step before peroxide (protein-before-heat).
defaultAssumption: Living-room couch / favorite chair coffee spill. W or W-S code = home-treatable with this protocol. S-only = solvent only, water-based coffee is mismatched (pro). X = vacuum only, pro. If cushion cover zips off and is washable, take the cover off and machine-wash — that's far easier.

spottingProtocol.instruction: Find code tag (W / W-S / S / X). W or W-S proceed; S-only = pro for water-based coffee; X = pro. Press paper towels straight down on the spill. Lift, refresh, repeat outside-in. No rubbing.

spottingProtocol.equipment: Cold water, white cloth, dry towel + weight
spottingProtocol.instruction: Dampen white cloth with cold water. Press on spot, lift, rotate, press. Cold only — heat sets tannin. Weighted dry towel 3–5 min after to extract surface moisture. Never pour.

spottingProtocol.equipment: Dawn + cold water on damp cloth
spottingProtocol.instruction: Dawn in cold water on damp cloth. Press 5 min. Blot. NO OxiClean — alkaline darkens tannin permanently.
Hidden test (under cushion seam). 3% peroxide on damp cloth 2 min. Color transfer = skip peroxide. Clean = proceed.
3% peroxide on damp cloth, press 5–10 min, blot. 1–2 cycles. Don't mix with ammonia / bleach / alkaline.

spottingProtocol.equipment: 1 tbsp vinegar + 1 cup cool water on damp cloth
spottingProtocol.instruction: Vinegar rinse 5 min. Neutralizes peroxide + keeps tannin light. Blot.
Weighted dry towel 30 min × 2–3 rounds + overnight. Fan-dry. Aggressive extraction matters more than chemistry on upholstery.

steps: 1. Code tag check. S/X = pro lane.
warnings: NEVER pour — batting saturation is the ceiling
NEVER alkaline cleaners — darkens tannin permanently
NEVER mix peroxide with bleach / ammonia
Aggressive extraction > aggressive chemistry on upholstery

homeSolutions.instruction: Find the upholstery tag (under a cushion). W / W-S = proceed below. S-only = solvent cleaning, water-based coffee chemistry doesn't match — call a pro. X = vacuum only, pro. If the cushion cover zips off and is washable, that's the easiest path: take it off, machine-wash cold per care label.

Press a thick stack of white paper towels straight down on the coffee. Lift, move to a dry section, press again. Work from outside the spill inward. Do NOT rub — rubbing pushes coffee into cushion batting where home chemistry can't reach.

Dampen a clean white cloth with COLD water. Press firmly on the spot, lift, rotate to a clean section, press again. Cold ONLY — heat sets coffee tannin. Don't pour — over-wetting drives coffee into the batting. Weighted dry towel 3–5 min after to extract.

homeSolutions.agent: Dawn + Cold Water on a Damp Cloth
homeSolutions.instruction: Mix 1 tablespoon Dawn in 2 cups cold water. Dampen a white cloth, press on the spot 5 minutes. Blot with a clean damp cloth. Do NOT use OxiClean or baking soda — alkaline cleaners turn coffee tannin DARKER and lock it in.
Find a hidden upholstery area (under a cushion, inside a seam). Dab 3% peroxide on a white cloth, press 2 min. Color transfer = skip peroxide. Clean = proceed.
Dab 3% drugstore peroxide on a damp cloth, press on the spot 5–10 minutes, blot. Repeat once if needed. Don't mix with ammonia, bleach, or OxiClean.
1 tablespoon white vinegar + 1 cup cool water. Dab on damp cloth, press 5 min. Neutralizes peroxide and keeps any residual tannin in its lighter (acid) form. Blot.

Stack heavy dry towels on the spot, weight with a book, 30 min. Replace with fresh towels, repeat 2–3 times. Finish with fresh towels overnight. Fan-dry in the morning. Aggressive extraction prevents the brown ring from coming back as the cushion dries.

homeSolutions.agent: Pro for Persistent Ring or Code S/X
homeSolutions.instruction: Take to a pro upholstery cleaner if: code is S-only / X, ring returns after a full cycle, OxiClean was applied before you got there, or pad saturation is suspected. Tell them: "Coffee on [W / W-S / S / X] upholstery, [black / with milk], age [hours], home-treated with cold + Dawn + 3% peroxide + vinegar + extraction. No hot water, no OxiClean, no alkaline."

steps: 1. Code tag check. S / X = pro. Zip-off cover = wash cover cold.
3. Cold damp-cloth blot + weighted extract; never pour.
4. Dawn + cold water damp cloth, 5 min.
9. Persistent ring / S-code = pro low-moisture extraction.
diyProtocol.whenToStop: Stop if upholstery code is S or X, if ring keeps returning after one full home cycle, or if alkaline cleaner was used previously.
warnings: NEVER pour — batting saturation is permanent
NEVER mix peroxide with bleach / ammonia
Aggressive extraction matters more than aggressive chemistry

neverDo: Never alkaline cleaners on tannin (OxiClean / baking soda / ammonia)
Never rub — drives coffee into batting
Never mix peroxide with bleach / ammonia
fiberSensitivities: S-only: solvent cleaning, water-based coffee mismatched — pro

materialWarnings: Code check before water — S/X is pro
Batting saturation is the upholstery ceiling

escalation.when: S-only / X code, persistent ring after one full home cycle, alkaline cleaner used previously, cushion batting saturation suspected.
escalation.whatToTell: "Coffee on [W / W-S / S / X] upholstery, [black / with milk], age [hours], home-treated with cold + Dawn + 3% peroxide + vinegar + weighted extraction. No hot water, no OxiClean, no alkaline. [Residual ring / batting saturation suspected]."
escalation.specialistType: professional upholstery cleaner with low-moisture extraction

contextQuestions: Upholstery code — W / W-S / S / X?
Has anyone applied OxiClean / baking soda?
deepSolveHooks.modifierNotes: Coffee with cream adds protein-before-heat ordering. Cushion-cover-washable is the easy path. Pre-applied OxiClean = tannin likely darkened permanently.
